description_long: This is a polygonal wooden barrel with a wide, open top and a slightly tapered body, reinforced by three thick, metallic-looking bands encircling its exterior. The wood staves are vertically aligned and display a subtle grain pattern, giving the barrel a rustic, utilitarian appearance. One side of the barrel features a detached, matching wooden lid or panel, suggesting the barrel can be covered or sealed. The metallic bands are evenly spaced, providing both structural support and visual contrast against the dark brown wood. The interior is hollow and unobstructed, making it suitable for storing or transporting various materials. The overall design is simple yet robust, typical of barrels found in urban or industrial settings.
description: A wooden barrel with three metallic bands and a detached wooden lid, featuring a wide open top and a sturdy, rustic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full barrel with all three metallic bands and no lid attached.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the detached wooden lid leaning against the barrel, with the open top clearly visible.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the detached lid more prominently in the foreground and the barrel's open interior.
description_view_3: Rear view with the lid partially obscured behind the barrel, showing the continuous metallic bands.
